starting_model: a number of search probes were generated by comparative modelling with the Rosetta suite [Das, R. & Baker, D. Macromolecular modeling with rosetta (2008) Annu Rev Biochem 77, 363-82], using PDB ID 3h47 as a template. In this way, 10000 models were obtained, scored and clustered. Several top ranking models gave solutions in MR using the program Phaser. To note, using PDB 3H47 (or any other available PDB with similar sequence) did not produce right solutions.
